title: trond error envelope
description: Universal error shape returned by any trond command on non-zero exit when --output json is set. Stable across all commands; agents can rely on these fields existing.

error_code.description: Stable machine-readable code. Examples: VALIDATION_ERROR, TARGET_UNREACHABLE, PREFLIGHT_FAILED, HUMAN_REQUIRED, NODE_NOT_FOUND, RENDER_ERROR, DOWNLOAD_ERROR.

exit_code.description: Process exit code. 0=success, 1=general, 2=validation, 3=target unreachable, 4=preflight failure, 10=human required.

message.description: Human-readable error description. Not stable across versions; agents should match on error_code, not message text.

suggestions.description: Ordered remediation hints, most-likely-fix first. Agents should attempt suggestions[0] before asking the user.

details.description: Optional command-specific structured context (e.g., which intent field failed validation).
